concept_overview.title: What is group_by_clause.title?
concept_overview.bodyMarkdown:
group_by_clause.title focuses on this idea: group_by_clause.summary

A good starting point is to say the requirement in plain language before writing SQL.

practice_note.title: How to practice group_by_clause.title
practice_note.bodyMarkdown:
Read the requirement, predict the result, run the query, and verify whether the output really answers the question.

That habit is especially important for group_by_clause.title.

module5_group_by_clause_practice_sql.title: Practice: group_by_clause.title
module5_group_by_clause_practice_sql.prompt:
The `products` table already exists.

Write a query that returns the number of rows and the average price.

Then run it.

help.hint_1: COUNT(*) gives the number of rows.

module5_group_by_clause_practice_sql.hint: Use aggregate functions in the SELECT list.
module5_group_by_clause_practice_sql.starterCode:
-- Summarize the table
SELECT COUNT(*) AS product_count, AVG(price) AS avg_price
FROM products

module5_group_by_clause_core_concept.prompt: What is the best description of group_by_clause.title?

options.a: It summarizes many rows into a smaller business answer.

tokens.t3: run the query and interpret the summary output
